prose:
The frontier-orbitals calculation for water was performed using Density Functional Theory (DFT) with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier `standard`). The calculation was run in the gas phase with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1, using PySCF. The geometry was sourced from the user-provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz` file and was not optimized as part of this calculation (it was a single point on the given geometry). The SCF converged in 7 cycles.

The calculated orbital energies are:
*   HOMO: -8.6037183 eV
*   LUMO: +0.33695037 eV
*   HOMO-LUMO Gap: 8.9406687 eV

The PySCF output log for this run is located at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp8flbf6td/live.json.out`.

No warnings were reported by the tool.
